query: query AliasTraffic($zoneTag: String!, $start: Date!, $end: Date!, $host: String!) { viewer { zones(filter: { zoneTag: $zoneTag }) { httpRequests1dGroups(limit: 30, filter: { date_geq: $start, date_leq: $end, clientRequestHTTPHost: $host }) { dimensions { date } sum { requests bytes cachedBytes cachedRequests } } } } }
